scripts.build:all:dev: npm run --prefix ./packages/dev/core build:core:dev && npm run --prefix ./packages/dev/extensions/mapbox build:vector:dev && npm run --prefix ./packages/dev/babylon build:babylon:dev && echo All packages builded successfully!
scripts.publish:all:dev: npm run --prefix ./packages/dev/core publish:core:dev && npm run --prefix ./packages/dev/extensions/mapbox publish:vector:dev && npm run --prefix ./packages/dev/babylon publish:babylon:dev && echo All packages published successfully!
